description: An EDI 850 (Purchase Order) document is received from a major retail partner and must be automatically processed.

nodes.task_description: The system receives an EDI 850 file and parses its contents.

expected_outcome.expected: The system successfully translates the EDI data into a structured format.

nodes.task_description: The system validates the data (e.g., item numbers, pricing) against master data.
A new sales order is automatically created in the OMS from the validated data.

expected_outcome.expected: A sales order is created without manual intervention.

nodes.task_description: The system sends back an EDI 855 (Purchase Order Acknowledgment) to the partner.

expected_outcome.expected: An automated acknowledgment is sent, confirming receipt of the order.
